title: useless buttons be gone(ubbg)
description:
removes every* useless button
minecraft has
body:
# Button Termination Mod

A mod that aims to **_~~terminate~~_** remove all the useless buttons Minecraft has.  
For example:  
### options screen:
* Telemetry Data  
* Credits & Attributions
### beacon screen
* Beacon X button  
### esc screen
* Report Bugs
* Give FeedBack

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

**Could you backport this mod to version X?**  
> Probably not

**Loader X when?**  
> Later

**did you copy the name from [rbbg](https://modrinth.com/mod/rbbg)?**  
> No(yes)

**Is it configurable?**  
> Yes! if you have [mod menu](https://modrinth.com/project/mOgUt4GM) installed than you could just open the config and change what buttons would be disabled

**What buttons are affected?**  
> Scroll up

**i have a questio-**
> ask in the [discord](https://discord.gg/vhhAEXHrgh)
</details>

### TODO:
* maintain the mod for the latest version
* add forge, neoforge, quilt support

### if you have any suggestions feel free to send them over
you can either use the [github](https://github.com/igameshat/uselessButtonsBeGone) or the [discord](https://discord.gg/vhhAEXHrgh)
